mapper.select: SELECT * FROM group_buy_activity WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND status = 1 AND start_time <= NOW() AND end_time >= NOW() ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM group_buy_activity WHERE status = 1 AND start_time <= NOW() AND end_time >= NOW() ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO group_buy_activity (activity_id, product_id, activity_name, group_buy_price, original_price, required_people, valid_duration, status, start_time, end_time, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{activityId}, #{productId}, #{activityName}, #{groupBuyPrice}, #{originalPrice}, #{requiredPeople}, #{validDuration}, #{status}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE group_buy_activity SET activity_name = #{activityName}, group_buy_price = #{groupBuyPrice}, required_people = #{requiredPeople}, valid_duration = #{validDuration}, status = #{status}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, update_time = NOW() WHERE activity_id = #{activityId}
